nasb.text: of which I was made a minister, according to the gift of God’s grace which was given to me according to the working of His power.

esv.text: Of this gospel I was made a minister according to the gift of God’s grace, which was given me by the working of his power.

cnv.text: 我作了福音的僕役，是照著　神的恩賜；這恩賜是按著他大能的作為賜給我的。

ccb.text: 上帝运用大能赐给我恩典，叫我成为这福音的使者。

csbs.text: 我成了这福音的仆人，是照着神恩典的赏赐；这赏赐是照着他大能的作为赐给我的。
